news.title: Iran's top diplomat expected in Pakistan Friday night to discuss peace plans: MS NOW
news.summary: President Donald Trump said he is in no rush to make a peace deal with Iran. Trump said the Iran war has harmed stocks and oil prices less than he expected.

news.title: Musk v. Altman heads to court next week. Here's what's at stake
news.summary: Elon Musk and Sam Altman's trial is scheduled to begin Monday. Jury selection is set to begin on Monday. The trial is expected to last two weeks.

news.title: Wall Street's 'fear gauge' is doing something unusual. What it means
news.summary: The S&P 500 touched record highs Thursday morning. The Cboe Volatility Index (VIX) remained stuck near 20 and is up from five days ago.

news.title: FDA fast-tracks psychedelic drug research following Trump executive order
news.summary: It's a big shift toward supporting psychedelic-based medicines for treatment-resistant depression, PTSD and substance use disorders, the FDA said. It's also a big move toward supporting the use of psychedelic drugs in the U.S.

news.title: Pirro drops probe into Fed’s Powell, paving way for Warsh confirmation
news.summary: Justice Department says it's backing down in standoff over leadership of the Federal Reserve. Announcement is expected to pave the way for Trump’s nominee for Fed chair, Kevin Warsh, to take over.

news.title: ‘My child will need lifelong support’: I’m in my 40s with $330,000. How can I make this last both our lifetimes?
news.summary: "I can't help feeling that it hasn't grown as much as it could have," he says. "The portfolio has grown, but I can’t help feeling ... that it has grown as little as it should have"

news.title: ‘AI genuinely freaks me out’: Do I leave my cushy $150,000 nonprofit job for a $215,000 position in data analytics?
news.summary: “There’s basically no upward mobility unless someone above me leaves,” he says. “There are no jobs for me if I’m not in the top spot.”

news.title: Private funds with high fees are coming for your 401(k) — and Trump’s acting labor secretary is cheering them on
news.summary: Donald Trump’s new retirement plan overseer is eager to open up Americans’ retirement accounts to exotic investments. Donald Trump's new retirement plans overseer wants to open retirement accounts up to foreign investments.

news.title: AMD’s stock is red hot and on track to hit a major milestone
news.summary: chip maker will likely benefit from server CPU demand more than Intel, Morgan Stanley says. Morgan Stanley: Chip maker will benefit more from server demand than Intel.
